---
title: "persona.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\persona.py"
loc: 11
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.10
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.35
---

## Intent
The `persona.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
